title: cyclaminus neapolitana
intro: Cyclaminus neapolitana, also known as Neapolitan cyclamen, is a type of flowering perennial plant that belongs to the primrose family. Its roots, leaves, and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cyclaminus neapolitana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often used to treat various ailments, and its extracts are also used in skincare products to combat acne and promote wound healing.
